# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t1 = 8
      STORE t1, [a]
      t2 = 6
      STORE t2, [b]
      t3 = 42
      STORE t3, [c]
      t4 = 5
      STORE t4, [d]
      t5 = 2
      STORE t5, [e]
      t6 = false
      STORE t6, [f]
      t7 = true
      STORE t7, [g]
      LOAD t8, [a]
      LOAD t9, [b]
      t10 = ADD t8, t9
      LOAD t11, [c]
      t12 = ADD t10, t11
      LOAD t13, [d]
      t14 = ADD t12, t13
      LOAD t15, [e]
      t16 = ADD t14, t15
      RETURN t16
